title: Command Lifecycle, Configuration, Pipeline, and Atomic Output · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs command lifecycle, configuration, pipeline, and atomic output from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for import-safe deterministic build pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Keep import-safe definitions separate from a main entry point that returns meaningful status and writes diagnostics to the correct stream.
Define defaults, project configuration, environment, flags, validation, provenance, and redacted effective configuration.
Separate discover, admit, decode, parse, validate, route, render, asset, verify, stage, and publish contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build into a fresh staging root, verify it, replace output deliberately, and preserve the prior good artifact on failure. Artifact under review: import-safe deterministic build pipeline.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Atomic Output, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Atomic Output: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 7738 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to own an import-safe staged build pipeline that preserves the prior artifact on failure; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build into a fresh staging root, verify it, replace output deliberately, and preserve the prior good artifact on failure.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output, keep Atomic Output connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Build into a fresh staging root, verify it, replace output deliberately, and preserve the prior good artifact on failure.

hints: For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output, name the reader, content authority, revision, source, span, parser, trust, route, render, asset, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery boundary, Atomic Output precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output, trace this concrete input and predict admission, decoding, tokenization, parsing, transformation, routing, rendering, validation, publication, failure, rollback, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review publishing team handles case 7738 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to own an import-safe staged build pipeline that preserves the prior artifact on failure; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build into a fresh staging root, verify it, replace output deliberately, and preserve the prior good artifact on failure.

For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Atomic Output, challenge the documented misconception with changed-source, delimiter, Unicode, nesting, route, URL, asset, viewport, cache, security, deployment, recovery, and controlled production-transfer evidence: Deleting output before building is the cleanest safe publication strategy.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
